Metadata.SimplifiedName: Spaceman Splorf - Planet of Doom (Pond Software - v1.1 - 2016)
Metadata.SourceFile: Spaceman Splorf - Planet of Doom v1.1 (Pond Software).d64
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0831 "SPACEMANSPLORF-0831" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Spaceman Splorf - Planet of Doom (Pond Software - v1.1 - 2016).prg"
